name: Nicole // Class of '09
description:
MalePOV! Nicole's trying to prove a point by getting Megan's boyfriend to leave her for him... but he isn't? What the fuck, why!?

College au!

User takes the place of Hunter in the revenge on Megan route!

Requested by anon! Thank you!!!

Chat wittewy what if my friends pick me up and we carve pumpkins wittewy... 🧍‍♂️ UHMMM SORRY, IT'S BEEN A FEW DAYS, YIKES! I still have.. a lot of requests... So my best estimate is if it keeps up about this pace, it won't be open again until next year, so.. I'm sorry sigmas, I'm trying XP

Next bot: Millie stays back from a mission to take care of an injured user!
